name: Compare App
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can enable product comparison functionality to help customers make more confident purchase decisions when evaluating multiple similar products. When shoppers can easily compare product features, prices, and specifications side-by-side, they tend to complete purchases faster and experience fewer returns due to better-informed buying decisions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product comparison tools streamline the decision-making process for customers considering multiple options. This helps reduce purchase hesitation and improves conversion rates by enabling shoppers to quickly identify which product best meets their specific needs during the search and discovery process."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This guide will walk you through the steps to enable and configure the Compare App Integration in your Shopify store."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Enable the Compare App in App Embeds"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Go to your Shopify Admin panel."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to\u00a0"}, {"text": "Online Store", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0>\u00a0"}, {"text": "Themes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Click on\u00a0"}, {"text": "Customize", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the left sidebar, select\u00a0"}, {"text": "App embeds", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", These buttons can be styled to match your store's design preferences. You can add custom CSS in your theme's stylesheet to adjust the appearance of these buttons."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XPCYUPVFW5P4/54a8726-untitled-9.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XPCYUPVFW5P4/54a8726-untitled-9.png", "name": "54a8726-Untitled_9.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 1618221, "width": 3022, "height": 1562, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FXPCYUPVFW5P4%2F54a8726-untitled-9.png", "active": true, "mediaID": 1223, "dateInserted": "2025-10-27T17:12:24+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With these steps, you can easily integrate and configure the Compare App in your Shopify store using Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify). This feature will enhance your customers' shopping experience by allowing them to compare products effortlessly."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us at\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
